heading: Service of process
label: 80510 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8051036:1604., , .Dec. 4, 1980Pub. L. 96–497, § 494 Stat. 2595The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
